evals.prompt: Show me what needs sign-off in the model.
evals.expected_output: Opens the trust-layer review dashboard (render_review.py). Lists entries needing human sign-off in two groups: Rule 1 (metrics + named filters, always queued) and Rule 2 (low-confidence items below the active threshold). Renders an HTML artifact under ~/.agami/review/<timestamp>/.

Updates the review_state of net_revenue to 'approved' in the OSI model, validates via validate_semantic_model.py before writing, commits the change to the per-profile git repo with attribution, and re-renders the dashboard. Refuses if validation fails.
